title: carex viridula subsp. oedocarpa
intro: Carex viridula subsp. oedocarpa, also known as the green sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex viridula subsp. oedocarpa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
